messages.content: 润色如下内容：This letter is intended to serve as a postgraduate study recommendation for Ms. Wanyun ZENG. I have known Ms. ZENG well since she took an internship in our organization during the period from December 2022 to February 2023. As her supervisor, I thus have a good chance to observe her performance and am qualified to provide an appraisal of her potential.

This letter is intended to serve as a postgraduate study recommendation for Ms. Wanyun ZENG. I have had the opportunity to know Ms. ZENG well during her internship in our organization from December 2022 to February 2023. As her supervisor, I have had the privilege of closely observing her performance and am qualified to provide an assessment of her potential.

中译英：她非常认真负责地完成了会议纪要整理的工作。我仍记得，她曾参加省自然资源厅召开市县国土空间规划编制审查视频培训会议，会议上学习专家解读四川省国土空间总体规划要点与关键并做好会议纪要，参会后向我非常仔细地汇报了会议内容。不仅如此，她非常善于发现问题，关注到很多工作内容的细节，并且求知欲很强，会及时向我和其他同事前辈们咨询疑惑。比如这次的培训会高度重视了各地“一张图”系统，即要对国土空间实行数字化、智能化管理，因此她也和我探讨了关于当前政府国土空间规划对智慧城市的需求，我认为她有独立思考的能力，并对国内智慧城市领域的发展有较深刻的理解和洞察。

She was very diligent and responsible in completing the work of organizing meeting minutes. I still remember that she participated in a video training meeting held by the Provincial Department of Natural Resources to review the preparation of municipal and county land spatial planning. During the meeting, she diligently took notes on the key points and interpretations of the overall land spatial planning in Sichuan Province provided by the experts. After the meeting, she reported the meeting content to me in great detail. Moreover, she has a keen eye for problem-solving, pays attention to the details of her work, and demonstrates a strong thirst for knowledge. She often consults me and other senior colleagues promptly when she has doubts or questions. For example, during this training session, great emphasis was placed on the "One Map" system implemented by different regions to digitally and intelligently manage land spatial planning. She discussed with me the current government's demand for smart cities in relation to land spatial planning. I believe she has the ability to think independently and possesses a deep understanding and insight into the development of smart cities in China.

润色如下内容：She was very diligent and responsible in completing the work of organizing meeting minutes. I still remember that she participated in a video training meeting held by the Provincial Department of Natural Resources to review the preparation of municipal and county land spatial planning. During the meeting, she diligently took notes on the key points and interpretations of the overall land spatial planning in Sichuan Province provided by the experts. After the meeting, she reported the meeting content to me in great detail. Moreover, she has a keen eye for problem-solving, pays attention to the details of her work, and demonstrates a strong thirst for knowledge. She often consults me and other senior colleagues promptly when she has doubts or questions. For example, during this training session, great emphasis was placed on the “One Map” system implemented by different regions to digitally and intelligently manage land spatial planning. She discussed with me the current government’s demand for smart cities in relation to land spatial planning. I believe she has the ability to think independently and possesses a deep understanding and insight into the development of smart cities in China.

She displayed remarkable diligence and responsibility in organizing meeting minutes. I distinctly recall her active participation in a video training meeting conducted by the Provincial Department of Natural Resources, where the preparation of municipal and county land spatial planning was reviewed. Throughout the meeting, she took meticulous notes regarding the experts' key points and interpretations of the overall land spatial planning in Sichuan Province. Following the meeting, she provided me with a comprehensive and detailed report on its content.

Furthermore, she possesses a sharp problem-solving acumen and demonstrates meticulous attention to detail in her work. Her insatiable thirst for knowledge is evident, as she frequently seeks timely guidance from me and other senior colleagues when faced with doubts or questions. During the aforementioned training session, special emphasis was placed on the implementation of the "One Map" system by different regions for the digital and intelligent management of land spatial planning. She engaged in discussions with me concerning the current government's demand for smart cities within the context of land spatial planning. I firmly believe that she possesses the ability to think independently, along with a profound understanding and insightful perspective on the development of smart cities in China.
此外，她勇于担当，做事有始有终，不半途而废。在我的指导下，她在实习期间曾为区长在全区大会中的城镇化领域收集发言资料以及PPT制作。在这期间，我们曾就全区国土空间规划和智慧城镇化等问题进行了深入交流，并且她还对PPT进行了不少于10次的修改和优化。但她没有任何抱怨，并愿意加班加点完成工作，这让我非常欣赏她的责任心和精益求精的态度。

Moreover, she is not afraid of taking on responsibility and demonstrates a strong sense of commitment, always seeing her tasks through to completion. Under my guidance, she once collected speech materials and created PowerPoint presentations for the district mayor's speech on urbanization at a large regional conference. During this time, we engaged in in-depth discussions on issues such as regional land spatial planning and smart urbanization. She tirelessly made no less than 10 revisions and optimizations to the PowerPoint presentation. Despite the workload, she never complained and willingly put in extra hours to complete the task. I greatly admire her sense of responsibility and dedication to excellence.

润色如下内容：Moreover, she is not afraid of taking on responsibility and demonstrates a strong sense of commitment, always seeing her tasks through to completion. Under my guidance, she once collected speech materials and created PowerPoint presentations for the district mayor’s speech on urbanization at a large regional conference. During this time, we engaged in in-depth discussions on issues such as regional land spatial planning and smart urbanization. She tirelessly made no less than 10 revisions and optimizations to the PowerPoint presentation. Despite the workload, she never complained and willingly put in extra hours to complete the task. I greatly admire her sense of responsibility and dedication to excellence.

Furthermore, she exhibits a remarkable sense of responsibility and is fearless when it comes to taking on challenging tasks. She displays unwavering commitment, ensuring that every responsibility is carried out to its completion. I had the privilege of guiding her as she collected speech materials and created PowerPoint presentations for the district mayor's keynote speech on urbanization at a significant regional conference. Throughout this project, we engaged in extensive discussions on topics such as regional land spatial planning and smart urbanization. She tirelessly revised and optimized the PowerPoint presentation no less than 10 times. Despite the demanding workload, she never once complained and willingly put in extra hours to ensure the task was completed to the highest standard. I greatly appreciate her strong sense of responsibility and her unwavering dedication to excellence.

润色如下内容：Owing to the above performance, I firmly believe that Miss ZENG is a promising student, and strongly recommend her to you. I think she will be a great addition to your postgraduate program and you will not be disappointed by her efforts to excel and fit into your university. If you have any questions at all about Miss Wanyun ZENG, please do not hesitate to contact me directly.

Based on the outstanding performance mentioned above, I have full confidence in recommending Ms. ZENG as a highly promising student. I strongly endorse her application to your esteemed postgraduate program, as I believe she will be a valuable asset to your university. Her dedication to excellence and ability to adapt will undoubtedly impress you. Should you require any further information or have any queries regarding Ms. Wanyun ZENG, please feel free to contact me directly.

润色如下内容：I am writing with great pleasure to recommend Miss Wanyun ZENG, one of my students for acceptance into your esteemed postgraduate program. I got first acquainted with Wanyun by teaching her the Remote Sensing Fundamentals and Applications course during the first semester of her sophomore year. Then I instructed her to respectively complete project regarding Sichuan Province land resources quality monitoring and the Golden Land Cup "Beautiful rural land space planning competition. As her instructor, I gained frequent contact with Wanyun, who in my eyes is always a diligent, bright, and outstanding student.

With great pleasure, I am writing to recommend Miss Wanyun ZENG, one of my students, for acceptance into your prestigious postgraduate program. I initially had the opportunity to teach Wanyun during her sophomore year in the Remote Sensing Fundamentals and Applications course. Since then, I have been closely involved in guiding her through various projects, including Sichuan Province land resources quality monitoring and the Golden Land Cup "Beautiful Rural Land Space Planning" competition.

During my interactions with Wanyun, she consistently displayed qualities of diligence, intelligence, and excellence. She consistently demonstrated a strong work ethic and a genuine dedication to her studies. Moreover, she actively sought opportunities to expand her knowledge and skills, showing a genuine passion for the subjects she pursued.

I have been particularly impressed by Wanyun's ability to grasp complex concepts and apply them effectively in real-world scenarios. Her exceptional analytical skills and attention to detail have been evident in the high-quality work she consistently produced. Her commitment to excellence and her active participation in class discussions have made her a standout student in my eyes.

In light of Wanyun's remarkable academic performance and her admirable personal qualities, I wholeheartedly recommend her for your postgraduate program. I firmly believe that she will contribute significantly to the program and will excel in her future endeavors. If you require any further information or have any questions regarding Wanyun's qualifications, please do not hesitate to contact me directly.

润色如下内容：In my course, Wanyun was an active participant in class discussions, showing sound logic and  effective communication skills. She usually took the lead in group study and case analysis and was able to organize her thoughts in logical manner. She was also an active learner who often came to discuss her opinions on academic topics with me after class. I really appreciate the academic passion  she showed towards study.

During my course, Wanyun actively engaged in class discussions, consistently showcasing her sound logic and effective communication skills. She often assumed a leadership role in group studies and case analyses, demonstrating her ability to organize her thoughts in a logical and coherent manner. Additionally, she regularly sought opportunities for further learning and would frequently approach me after class to discuss her thoughts and opinions on academic topics. I truly appreciate her strong academic passion and her proactive approach to her studies.
中译英：作为组员，她很好地协助完成政府项目中四川省雅安市万源市、雨城区的耕地后备资源监测和汇总报告撰写。

As a team member, she provided great assistance in completing the monitoring and compilation of a report on the reserve farmland resources in Wanyuan City and Yucheng District, Ya'an City, Sichuan Province for a government project.

润色如下内容：As a team member, she provided great assistance in completing the monitoring and compilation of a report on the reserve farmland resources in Wanyuan City and Yucheng District, Ya’an City, Sichuan Province for a government project.

As a valued team member, Ms. ZENG played a crucial role in the successful completion of a government project. Specifically, she provided exceptional assistance in monitoring and compiling a comprehensive report on the reserve farmland resources in both Wanyuan City and Yucheng District, located within the city of Ya'an, Sichuan Province.

(a) 你在考试过程中并未一直出现在摄像头视野中（请查看摄像录像的大约00:01:50、00:25:40、00:37:58、00:55:42处）；
(b) 观察到你弯下身去捡起了什么东西，伴随有声音，你眼镜中出现了第二个设备的反光（请查看摄像录像的大约00:00:09处）。之后，你的眼镜中闪烁着光亮，并听到你将某物放在桌子上的声音（请查看摄像录像的大约00:00:25到00:00:29处）；
(c) 在整个考试过程中，可以听到你不断地拿起某物和将某物放在桌子上的声响（请查看摄像录像的大约00:04:30、00:19:37、00:20:27、00:24:01、00:40:36、00:54:43处）。
悉尼大学申诉解释套路

作为悉尼大学申诉的解释套路，你可以按照以下步骤组织你的解释：

1. 简要陈述申诉目的：明确指出你的目的是为了对之前的决定提出解释，并恳请对方重新考虑你的情况。

2. 引用具体细节或证据：列出相关细节或证据，以支持你的解释和观点。这些证据可以包括书面材料、邮件对话记录、照片等。确保提供足够的信息，以便对方能够充分了解你的情况。

3. 解释目击证人或观察到的情况：如果有目击证人或者有人注意到了你所解释的事情，可以引用他们的证词或者陈述。这些证词可以提供额外的证明，支持你的解释。

4. 表达诚挚的歉意（如果适用）：如果你需要解释某些行为、错误或误解，表达你的诚挚歉意。确保表达你的悔意，并强调你对错误的认识或对误解的解释。

5. 提供解决方案或请求：在结尾部分，根据你的情况提供一个解决方案或者提出请求。要求对方重新审视你的情况、撤销原先的决定或采取其他适当的行动。

注意事项：
- 保持简洁明了：确保你的解释清晰、简洁，并且容易理解。
- 遵循正式的语气与格式：在书面解释中，使用正式的语气和格式。使用适当的称呼和礼貌用语来表达你的想法。
- 语气要客观和理性：避免情绪化或争吵的言辞，保持客观和理性的语气。用事实和证据来支持你的观点。
- 格式正确：要遵循适当的格式，包括书信的抬头、日期、称呼、段落分明等。

最重要的是，根据你的具体情况和申诉内容，适当调整上述建议，以确保你的解释能够清晰地解释你的观点和情况。尽量通过理性、有序的方式进行解释，并寻求对方的合理考虑。
